fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the report layout update.

fields.name: Field Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field or element in the report layout that the update pertains to.

fields.name: Message
fields.tooltip: Specifies detailed information about the update to the report layout. This information is useful when an error occurs to help you fix the error.

fields.name: Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the report object that uses the custom report layout.

fields.name: Layout Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the report layout.

fields.name: Layout Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the file type of the report layout. The following table includes the types that are available:
